revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:御所神社 (つるぎ町)]] {{Expand Japanese|御所神社 (つるぎ町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Gosho Shrine | native_name = 御所神社 | image = Gosho shrine, Sadamitsu.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Gosho Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.994167|134.0725}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Amenohiwashi|lt=Amenohiwashi|ja|天日鷲神|ko|아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|qid=Q10939697|1=Otori-sama}} }} {{nihongo|'''Gosho Shrine'''|御所神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135009132|ltq=Q135009132|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q9610964|ltq=Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 18 ** P155: {{ill|Yamatoookuni- Shrine|lt=Yamatoookuni- Shrine|qid=Q135041319|1=Yamatoookuni- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041330|ltq=Q135041330|qid=Q135041330|1=Amamurakumono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Tsurugi, Tokushima|lt=Tsurugi|arz|تسوروجى|ceb|Tsurugi Chō|en|Tsurugi, Tokushima|es|Tsurugi (Tokushima)|fa|تسوروگی، توکوشیما|fr|Tsurugi (Tokushima)|id|Tsurugi, Tokushima|it|Tsurugi (Tokushima)|ja|つるぎ町|ko|쓰루기정|ms|Tsurugi, Tokushima|my|ဆွတ်ရုဂိမြို့|pl|Tsurugi (Tokushima)|ru|Цуруги (посёлок)|sv|Tsurugi, Tokushima|tl|Tsurugi, Tokushima|tr|Tsurugi|uk|Цуруґі (Токусіма)|uz|Tsurugi (Tokushima)|zh|劍町|qid=Q1206005|1=Tsurugi, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Q907457|ltq=Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q3205811|ltq=Q3205811|qid=Q3205811|1=Oe District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|33.994167|134.0725}} == image (P18) == * Gosho shrine, Sadamitsu.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Amenohiwashi|lt=Amenohiwashi|ja|天日鷲神|ko|아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|qid=Q10939697|1=Otori-sama}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20060723061802/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/540301.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183192 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == religion or worldview (P140) == * {{ill|Q812767|ltq=Q812767|qid=Q812767|1=Shinto}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Unranked|lt=Unranked|ja|无位|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}} * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|ko|정5위|zh|正五位|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank|ja|従四位|ko|종4위|zh|從四位|qid=Q11071127|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == native label (P1705) == * {'text': '御所神社', 'language': 'ja'} == name in kana (P1814) == * ごしょじんじゃ == postal code (P281) == * 779-4109 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041321|ltq=Q135041321|qid=Q135041321|1=Imuheno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県美馬郡つるぎ町貞光字吉良', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': 'Aza Kira, Sadamitsu, Tsurugi-chō, Mima-gun, Tokushima-ken 779-4109', 'language': 'en'} * {'text': '徳島県吉野川市山川町忌部山', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:御所神社 (つるぎ町)]] {{wikidata link|Q119929720}} == Japanese content == {{?????|date=2026-01}} {{?? |?? = Gosho Shrine |?? = [[File:Gosho shrine, Sadamitsu.jpg|270px|Gosho Shrine (Okusha of Imbe Shrine)]]
Torii and worship hall |??? = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mima District|Q1156496|qid=Q1156496|1=Mima District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Tsurugi|Q1206005|qid=Q1206005|1=Tsurugi, Tokushima}} Sadamitsu Aza Kira |?? = {{?????2????|33|59|39|N|134|4|21|E|display=ti}} |?? = {{ill|lt=Amenohiwashi|Q10939697|qid=Q10939697|lt=Amenohiwashi-no-Mikoto|1=Otori-sama}} |?? = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myojin Taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|lt=Myojin Taisha|1=Myōjin Taisha}}) candidate shrine
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |?? = unknown |?? = one-bay {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} with copper plate roof |?? = |?? = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=????|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Gosho Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Tsurugi|Q1206005|qid=Q1206005|1=Tsurugi, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Mima District|Q1156496|qid=Q1156496|1=Mima District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === Its founding is unknown. It stands in a mountainous area of former {{ill|lt=Sadamitsu Town|Q7397533|qid=Q7397533|1=Sadamitsu, Tokushima}}, at a place called Goshohira. It was worshipped by the {{ill|lt=Miki clan of Awa|UNKNOWN|lt=Miki clan}}, descendants of the Imbe lineage in this area, and is thought to have been a branch enshrinement of the Engishiki Myojin Taisha Imbe ShrineYoneo Okada, "Imbe Shrine / ?asahiko Shrine" (in ''Nihonshi Sh?hyakka '', {{ill|lt=T?ky?d? Shuppan|Q11524645|qid=Q11524645|1=Tōkyōdō Shuppan}}, 1977). It long disputed candidate status for the Engishiki Imbe Shrine with {{ill|lt=Imbe Shrine (Yoshinogawa)|Q11490723|qid=Q11490723|lt=Yamazaki Imbe Shrine|1=Inbe Shrine (Yoshinogawa)}} in {{ill|lt=Yoshinogawa|Q592500|qid=Q592500|1=Yoshinogawa, Tokushima}}. In {{ill|lt=1881|Q7808|qid=Q7808|1=1881}} (Meiji 14), this site was fixed as the Imbe shrine site. Yamazaki Imbe Shrine objected, and the {{ill|lt=Daj?kan (Meiji period)|Q125768223|qid=Q125768223|lt=Daj?kan|1=Dajōkan}} issued a compromise setting the shrine site at {{ill|lt=Nikenyach?|Q11371805|qid=Q11371805|1=Nikenyach?}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, while preserving this place as the old site. Later, Gosho Shrine became a sessha of {{ill|lt=Imbe Shrine|Q11490722|qid=Q11490722|1=Inbe Shrine}} in Tokushima City. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amenohiwashi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Kira Edo-higan cherry tree === There is an {{ill|lt=Edo-higan|Q51117378|qid=Q51117378|1=Prunus itosakura}} cherry in front of the shrine, estimated at over 400 years old, selected among the "100 Recommended Viewpoints of Nishi-Awa." It has a trunk circumference of 4.5m and height about 20m, branching into three major trunks from around 1.5m above ground. It was designated a Tokushima Prefecture natural monument on {{ill|lt=February 23|Q2352|qid=Q2352|1=February 23}}, {{ill|lt=1971|Q2475|qid=Q2475|1=1971}} (Sh?wa 46){{Cite web|??|url=https://www.town.tokushima-tsurugi.lg.jp/docs/3459.html|title=Tokushima Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments|publisher=Tsurugi Town|accessdate=2021-09-14}}. === Access === * About 20 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Sadamitsu Station|Q7397535|qid=Q7397535|1=Sadamitsu Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|qid=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}}. * About 25 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Mima Interchange|Q11609440|qid=Q11609440|1=Mima interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|qid=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. === Notes === === External links === * [https://www.jalan.net/kankou/spt_36464ag2130014098/ Imbe Shrine (Gosho Shrine)] - Jalan. * [https://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364681/detail/36464ag2130014098 Imbe Shrine (Gosho Shrine)] - Zenkoku Mirunavi. * [https://www.awanavi.jp/spot/20537.html Kira Edo-higan Cherry] - Awa Navi. {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Gosho Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Gosho Shrine]][[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:Buildings in Tsurugi]] [[Category:History of Tsurugi]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]]
